suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the `python-library-worker` skill so its external-URL grep guidance matches this repository's `AGENTS.md`: scope the scan to the new test files rather than all of `test/`, because `test/test_ingest_f006.py` intentionally contains cached cassava references.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original integration-validation review found `.factory/skills/python-library-worker/SKILL.md` instructing workers to run `rg 'amazonaws|cassava\\.ucsd' test/`, while mission `AGENTS.md` explicitly narrows the check to `test/test_deep_upsert.py` and `test/test_generic_ingest.py`; the follow-up fix kept the repo-aligned scoped check and passed scrutiny.
